title.rendered: AMI Receives the Lenovo Diamond Award

content.rendered:
Recently at the Lenovo Supplier Conference held by Lenovo Group in Hangzhou, China, AMI was presented with the Lenovo Diamond Award.

The Lenovo Diamond Award was presented in recognition of AMI’s outstanding support for UEFI BIOS development, platform support and validation work on multiple Lenovo products. AMI has enjoyed a close relationship with Lenovo over the years and hopes to continue development work on Lenovo products.
